nasb.text: Then the heifer shall be burned in his sight; its hide and its flesh and its blood, with its refuse, shall be burned.

esv.text: And the heifer shall be burned in his sight. Its skin, its flesh, and its blood, with its dung, shall be burned.

cnv.text: 然後，在他面前把牛焚燒，牛的皮、肉、血和糞，都要焚燒。

ccb.text: 然后，要当着他的面焚烧红母牛，牛的皮、肉、血和粪都要烧掉。
